title: pupilla lucida
intro: Pupilla lucida, also known as Dog's Eye, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its yellow flowers and shiny green leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties. The medicinal properties of Pupilla lucida have been attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, offering several health benefits such as relief from pain, improved circulation, and enhanced overall well-being. Pupilla lucida can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
